description: Fragment of a list of pledges to charity made at a wedding. The bridegroom, styled "the elder, the scholar Abu al-Baha" (written in larger letters, different from the rest), pledged (Ar. asma) 1/2 dirham, and so did the others. (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, p. 495, App. C 65)
description_he: קטע מרשימת התחייבויות לצדקה בחתונה, החתן מכונה 'הזקן החכם אבו אל-בהא'
